prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中国石油大学（北京）为211工程、双一流建设高校，校本部软科中国大学排名2026年约第62名，属中上水平理工类高校；克拉玛依校区共享校本部211身份与办学资源，在石油石化领域具有行业影响力；该校声誉数据中未见明显负面舆情或投档异常记录；抖音热度数据未收录该校，整体关注度一般，无显著报考心理冲击信号；校本部石油与天然气工程为传统优势学科（第五轮学科评估A+），化学工程与技术、地质资源与地质工程等亦为强项；克拉玛依校区招生专业以石油工程、油气储运工程、资源勘查工程等为核心，与校本部优势学科高度匹配，对行业意向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热推荐；石油工程、化学工程与工艺等传统工科热度平稳；甘肃省2026年普通高考考生总数约218700人，较2025年（历史类+物理类约179817人）大幅增加，按比例估算物理类考生约147623人（+21.5%），考生规模显著扩大将加剧竞争；学校位于新疆克拉玛依市，属西北地区，与甘肃省地理距离较近，对西北考生有一定地域亲和力；该校在甘肃省招生占比约2.3%（2025年），属中等偏上水平，表明该校对甘肃考生有稳定的招生倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次15378名、2026年扩招11.76%、甘肃省物理类考生大幅增加约21.5%以及学校211层次与石油行业优势，扩招与考生增加两因素对冲后竞争仍略趋激烈，预测2026年最低位次约16663名，区间16163–17163名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (including physics) were approximately 22729 → 20727 → 17517 → 19690 → 15378, showing an overall fluctuating downward trend (decreasing ranking numbers indicate easing competition). However, in 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, there was a temporary rebound, and in 2025, it significantly moved forward to 15378, with a cumulative forward movement of about 4312 in the last two years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is 15378. The university's enrollment plan for science (physics) in Gansu Province was 45 in 2021, 55 in 2022, 58 in 2023, 75 in 2024, and 68 in 2025. The 2026 plan increases to 76, an expansion of 8 students (+11.76%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its main campus ranks approximately 62nd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, placing it in the upper-middle tier of science and engineering universities. The Karamay Campus shares the 211 status and educational resources of the main campus and has industry influence in the petroleum and petrochemical field. There are no significant negative public opinions or abnormal admission records in the university's reputation data. Douyin popularity data does not include this university, indicating generally low attention and no significant psychological impact on applicants. The main campus's petroleum and natural gas engineering is a traditional advantageous discipline (A+ in the fifth round of discipline evaluation), with chemical engineering and technology, geological resources and geological engineering also being strong. The Karamay Campus offers majors such as petroleum engineering, oil and gas storage and transportation engineering, and resource exploration engineering, which are highly aligned with the main campus's advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting students with industry intentions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering and automation continue to be highly popular. Traditional engineering majors like petroleum engineering and chemical engineering and technology have stable popularity. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Gansu Province is approximately 218,700, a significant increase from 2025 (about 179,817 for history and physics categories). By proportion, physics candidates are estimated to be about 147,623 (+21.5%), and the substantial increase in candidate numbers will intensify competition. The university is located in Karamay, Xinjiang, in the northwest region, which is geographically close to Gansu Province, offering some regional affinity for northwestern candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Gansu is about 2.3% (2025), which is moderately high, indicating a stable enrollment preference for Gansu students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 15378, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 11.76%, the significant increase of about 21.5% in physics candidates in Gansu Province, and the university's 211 level and petroleum industry advantages, the offset between expansion and candidate increase still results in slightly intensified competition. The predicted 2026 lowest ranking is approximately 16663, with a range of 16163–17163.

- Resource Exploration Engineering
- Automation.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Safety Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Chemical Engineering and Technology
- Materials Science and Engineering
- Environmental Engineering (Oil and Gas Production and Processing Environmental Protection)
- Statistics
- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics
- Finance.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 16163–17163, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Computer Science, Mechanical, New Energy, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Petroleum Engineering, Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation, etc.) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors (Chemical Engineering and Technology, Mathematics, Finance, etc.) as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 16000), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship petroleum majors. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range, you can lean towards Tier 3 safety majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (including history category) were approximately 5777 → 3968 → 3164 → 2756 → 2694, showing a continuous forward trend (ranking numbers decrease year by year, competition tightens), with a cumulative forward shift of about 3083 positions over the past 5 years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is 2694. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Gansu Province was 7 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 7 in 2025. The plan for 2026 remains at 7, unchanged from 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (Beijing) is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, with its main campus ranked approximately 62nd in the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Rankings. The Karamay Campus shares the 211 status, and although it is primarily science and engineering focused, its liberal arts majors (Accounting, Chinese Language and Literature, Ideological and Political Education) still hold some appeal due to the 211 platform. No significant negative public opinion or abnormal admission records were found in the university's reputation data. Douyin popularity data was not collected for this university, indicating generally low attention and no significant psychological impact signals from applicants. The main campus's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in petroleum and petrochemical fields, with no directly corresponding A-class disciplines for liberal arts majors. Accounting corresponds to Business Administration (B+ at the main campus), while Chinese Language and Literature and Ideological and Political Education have no corresponding A-class discipline evaluation data, indicating generally average academic strength in liberal arts.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Accounting/Finance/Auditing majors have a recommended social popularity, Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese majors are also recommended, while Ideological and Political Education (teacher training direction) shows divided popularity with a wait-and-see attitude. The total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Gansu Province in 2026 is approximately 218,700, with an estimated 71,078 history category students (a 21.8% increase), significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. The university is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, in the northwest region, relatively close geographically to Gansu Province. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts in Gansu Province is stable at 7–9 students, with a stable proportion, indicating sustained recruitment for Gansu students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2694, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant increase of about 21.8% in history category candidates in Gansu Province, and the limited appeal of the 211 platform for liberal arts, the expansion of the candidate pool will intensify competition. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 2744, with a range of 2250–3238.
